_comment: Expected `next build` render mode for every route, asserted by scripts/assert-route-classification.mjs after a build. Guards the conversion-track payoff (3.0.4.8+3.0.4.9): a route must not silently regress to a more dynamic mode. Modes: 'static' = ○ (fully prerendered), 'partial' = ◐ (partial prerender — static shell + request-time <Suspense> holes), 'dynamic' = ƒ (server-rendered per request). New routes must be added here or the check fails. If a change is intentional, update this file in the same commit. Choosing a mode (priority, weighed against the page's purpose): prefer 'static' first; if the page needs request-time data, isolate it in a <Suspense> hole so the shell still prerenders ('partial'); use 'dynamic' only when the whole screen is genuinely per-request (/api/* handlers, mutations, per-request auth/DB). Counterweight — never force a more-static mode than the page honestly supports; a truly full-screen dynamic surface should be dynamic, not contorted into a fake shell.

_reasons./: Transient auth_error query param renders in a Suspense dynamic hole; hero + tiles are static.
_reasons./sites: Client-state class/type filters (not searchParams) plus a searchParams-driven sort; the live-price overlay streams from a dynamic hole.
_reasons./sites/[id]: Per-site detail (params + DB + live prices) streams from a dynamic hole.
_reasons./admin: Per-user: the session-gated single-page dashboard (KPIs, status strip, traffic, users) is a request-time dynamic hole; visx charts are client-only islands inside it.
_reasons./admin/access: Per-user: session-gated admin-role management + audit is a request-time dynamic hole.
_reasons./admin/access/[userId]: Per-user: session-gated admin user detail (a user's linked characters + sessions; force-unlink / reassign / force-logout) is a request-time dynamic hole; the page container prerenders.
_reasons./characters: Per-user: the session-gated character-management list (link / switch active / unlink) is a request-time dynamic hole; the page container is the static shell.
_reasons./industry: Industry dashboard — static shell of the header, typed hint, and the section-grid skeleton; the session + linked-character read (plus the corp gates) is ONE request-time dynamic hole feeding the client section grid, which ranks populated sections above empty ones and resolves everything client-side: recents (localStorage), build templates (/api/account/saved-plans), the personal + corp job boards (/api/account/industry-jobs, /api/account/corp-industry-jobs — Neon stale-gated on-view reads; each job's live ready + countdown derives client-side from its absolute end_date). The header's used/total slot readout is its own small hole, fetching capacity from /api/account/industry-slots client-side.
_reasons./industry/templates: Build-templates library — fully static shell; the list is a client island fetching /api/account/saved-plans on mount (an anonymous visitor settles to a sign-in hint via the client roster signal); load navigates to /industry/[id]?plan= (the planner's TemplateLoader replays it), and rename/favorite/delete reuse the existing saved-plans endpoints.
_reasons./industry/[id]: Per-blueprint planner ([id] param + cached structure/prices) streams from a dynamic hole, which also reads the build-character preference cookie; page chrome is the static shell.
_reasons./skills: Per-user: the session-gated linked-character read (names, portraits, scope health) is a request-time dynamic hole; the page container is the static shell, and the queue data itself is fetched client-side from /api/account/skills (a Neon stale-gated on-view read; the live countdown derives client-side from each entry's absolute finish_date) — no server render-time data.
_reasons./jobs: Per-user: the session-gated linked-character read (names, portraits, scope health) is a request-time dynamic hole; the page container is the static shell, and the personal job boards are fetched client-side from /api/account/industry-jobs and the corporation jobs from /api/account/corp-industry-jobs (both Neon stale-gated on-view reads; each job's live ready + countdown derives client-side from its absolute end_date) — no server render-time data.
_reasons./structures: Per-user: the session-gated structure builder (the saved custom-structures read + the cached SDE picker options) is a request-time dynamic hole; the page container is the static shell. The builder + saved list are a client island calling the /api/account/custom-structures CRUD.
_reasons./settings: Per-user: the session-gated account-settings content (the registry-resolved controls + the Station_Manager corp-sharing read) is a request-time dynamic hole; the page container is the static shell.
_reasons./changelog: The newest changelog master is deploy-static: a cached file read + parse renders the static shell, and the shared rail's active-version highlight is isolated in Suspense around usePathname.
_reasons./changelog/[slug]: Older changelog masters are prerendered from generateStaticParams and the same cached parse, but the parameterized route is partial because the shared rail's active-version highlight reads usePathname inside a Suspense request-time hole. Unknown and newest-master aliases return notFound().
_reasons./devlog: The dev log (content/devlog/) is deploy-static: a cached file read + parse renders the static shell; the file-browser rail's active-document highlight is a usePathname read isolated in a <Suspense> (the NavTools pattern), so the shell stays static like /changelog.
_reasons./devlog/[slug]: Prerendered per slug (generateStaticParams enumerates them all) from the same cached parse, but partial not static: the shared layout's active-document highlight reads the path (usePathname) in a <Suspense> boundary, and for the parameterized route the shell is shared across slugs, so that highlight is a request-time hole. The /devlog index bakes its own known path and stays static (○). Cache Components disallows the dynamicParams route config, so an unknown slug returns notFound().
_reasons./api/industry/blueprints: Blueprint search index is deploy-static SDE data (cached 'max', SDE-tag revalidated), so the handler prerenders to a static JSON asset — no per-request input.
_reasons./api/industry/systems: Universe system search index (every persistent solar system — K-space, Pochven, J-space) is deploy-static SDE data (cached 'max', SDE-tag revalidated), so the handler prerenders to a static JSON asset — no per-request input. Matched client-side by the systems search source (the build-location pickers + the structure-pin control).
_reasons.dynamic /api/*: Route handlers — per-request by nature (auth, mutations, DB queries, crons, external calls). Justified dynamic.
